channel.title: Pages on Agnes Site
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Agnes Site

item.title: About Me
item.description:
Mark Chang

IT Manager, Ormiston Senior College, New Zealand

I currently run the IT operations at Ormiston Senior College based in Auckland, New Zealand. Previously, I ran ICT operations at the Mission Heights Schools which is also based in Auckland, New Zealand.

My skills and expertise include system architecture design, configuration and integration of Unix and Linux OSes as well as networking and storage.

I enjoy tinkering with gadgets and talking to people about the value and philosophy of open source software.
